text.content: From OKR S1-KR1: Design and freeze v1 of the AI Operations Jumpstart scope, pricing, and deliverables. P2 critical — no consulting revenue without a productised offer. Scope: (1) Define Jumpstart structure: discovery phase (SPIN + Challenger), use-case matrix scoring, 1-2 workflows on Nexus. (2) Set pricing in AUD. (3) Define clear deliverables list per engagement. (4) Write Jumpstart playbook in Holocron. (5) Create Jumpstart brief template for Ahsoka. Prerequisites: Ahsoka Pilot 1 (TKT-0082) must be underway to inform package design. OKR: S1-KR1, S1-KR2, C1-KR2. Pillar: Consulting.
